title: Patient Services Representative
description: AbbVie seeks Patient Services Representatives to support patients on our medication programs through remote outreach. You'll respond to patient inquiries, provide treatment information, and help connect patients with resources. This role requires compassion, attention to detail, and strong communication skills. Working from home, you'll be part of our commitment to improving patient outcomes and access to care.
responsibilities: Answer patient inquiries about medications, side effects, and treatment options via phone, email, and secure messaging
Provide education materials and connect patients with copay assistance programs and support services
Document patient interactions accurately in our CRM system and escalate complex cases appropriately
Maintain confidentiality and HIPAA compliance in all patient communications
Collaborate with clinical teams to stay updated on treatment guidelines and patient support programs
